MINI MINUTES: APPREARENCES: JACK F. BONANNO, ATTY FOR PETITIONER, DENNIS YEE, PETITIONER
PETER ISOLA, OK LOK, MR. DONNER, ATTY FOR JUDY CHU, JUDY CHU, RESPONDENT AND AMY LUK, TRANSALATOR. RESPONDENT UNDERSTANDS AND AGREES TO ALL OF THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT. TRIAL DATES TAKEN OFF CALENDER.
JUDGE:J. DEARMAN, CLERK:L. DOTSON, RPTR:K.BERSAMIN, CSR 11722

Petition To Remove Trustee & To Compel Accounting
Off Calendar Feb-28-2006 Continued To Apr-19-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Edward A. Koplowitz appearing for Judy Chiu. Jack Bonanno appearing for Dennis and Timothy Yee. Peter Isola appearing for On Lok Senior Health Services. Agreement reached. The written settlement agreement is being circulated for signatures. Counsel will file petition for approval of settlement agreement. Court agreed to set the petition for approval of settlement agreement for hearing on 4/19. Matter is continued to 4/19. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.
